criteria_results.criterion: Describes at least 2 distinct pain points

task_audits.reviewer_notes: Word count verified at 118 words. Two distinct pain points identified: (1) time lost to manual formatting, (2) cash flow gap from delayed payments. Audience callout present in opening sentence.

criteria_results.criterion: References the problem framing from task-001
Mentions all 3 key features by name
Uses plain, non-technical language suitable for non-developer freelancers

task_audits.reviewer_notes: All 3 features present: 'one-click invoice generation', 'payment tracking dashboard', 'automated reminders'. No technical jargon detected. Problem callbacks present ('no templates to wrangle', 'chase email' mirrors tone of task-001).

criteria_results.criterion: Contains a direct call to action with the phrase 'free trial' or '14-day trial'

task_audits.reviewer_notes: Word count verified at 38 words. Phrase '14-day trial' present. Tone assessment: confident (uses 'ready', 'faster') without pressure language. 'No credit card required' reduces friction without being pushy. Recommend human reviewer confirm tone alignment with brand voice.
